name: American Jewelry & Loan - Southgate
description_short: Detroit-based pawn shop chain offering collateral loans, buying, and selling of jewelry, electronics, tools, and luxury goods across four Michigan locations.
description_long:
American Jewelry and Loan was founded in 1978 and has grown to become one of the largest and most recognizable pawn shops in the world. The company operates four locations across Michigan: Detroit (flagship), Hazel Park, Pontiac, and Southgate. The Detroit location gained significant media attention as the setting for the reality television series Hardcore Pawn, which featured the business operations and transactions. Despite the television exposure, the company maintains its core function as a full-service pawn shop.

The company offers three primary services: pawn loans on collateral including jewelry, electronics, tools, and other items; retail purchasing of items at discounted prices including GIA-certified diamonds, luxury handbags, fine jewelry, timepieces, and equipment; and selling services where customers can exchange valuables for fair market value. The website emphasizes quick access to cash through collateral-based lending, positioning itself as a practical alternative for immediate financial needs.

American Jewelry and Loan distinguishes itself through its 45+ year operating history, multi-location presence, and brand recognition from the Hardcore Pawn television series. The company operates during extended business hours (9:30am-6:00pm Monday-Saturday) and provides contact through phone (313-345-4000) and email. The website includes appointment booking functionality and a newsletter signup, suggesting organized customer service operations.

As a pawn shop, this business model involves lending money in exchange for personal property as collateral, which carries inherent risks and limitations. Customers must be willing to part with personal items temporarily or permanently, and interest rates on pawn loans are not disclosed on the website. The service is best suited for individuals needing immediate cash who have valuable collateral and understand the terms of secured lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Four convenient Michigan locations (Detroit, Hazel Park, Pontiac, Southgate) for local access
45+ year operating history since 1978 demonstrates established business longevity
Extended business hours (9:30am-6:00pm, six days weekly) for customer convenience
Specializes in high-value items including GIA-certified diamonds and luxury goods
Offers three transaction types: pawn loans, retail purchases, and direct selling
Professional valuation services for jewelry and luxury items
Online appointment booking available for customer scheduling
Established brand recognition from Hardcore Pawn television series
cons: Interest rates and loan terms not disclosed on website; requires direct inquiry
Limited to collateral-based lending model; not suitable for unsecured borrowing needs
Closed Sundays; limited weekend availability compared to some competitors
No online loan application or payment system described on website
Pawn model requires customers to surrender personal items as collateral
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own jewelry, electronics, or tools
Luxury goods buyers seeking discounted diamonds, handbags, and timepieces
People in the Detroit metropolitan area with convenient access to four locations
Customers comfortable with collateral-based lending and temporary asset surrender
diagnosis: Best for consumers in the Detroit area who need immediate cash and own valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools). Primary caveat: pawn lending requires surrendering personal property and involves interest charges that should be carefully evaluated before borrowing.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and personal property
Purchase of GIA-certified diamonds and fine jewelry at retail discount
Fair market value assessment for customer sellable items
Online loan payment services (referenced on website)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
